88: private fun formatDateHeader(timestamp: Long): String {
89:     val msgCal = Calendar.getInstance().apply { timeInMillis = timestamp }
90:     val todayCal = Calendar.getInstance()
91: 
92:     return when {
93:         isSameDay(msgCal, todayCal) -> "Today"
94:         isSameDay(msgCal, todayCal.apply { add(Calendar.DAY_OF_YEAR, -1) }) -> "Yesterday"
95:         else -> SimpleDateFormat("MMMM d, yyyy", Locale.getDefault()).format(Date(timestamp))
96:     }
97: }
98: 
99: private fun isSameDay(a: Calendar, b: Calendar): Boolean =
100:     a.get(Calendar.YEAR) == b.get(Calendar.YEAR) &&
101:             a.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_YEAR) == b.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_YEAR)

522: 
523: private sealed class DisplayItem {
524:     data class MessageItem(val message: SmsMessage) : DisplayItem()
525:     data class DateHeader(val label: String) : DisplayItem()
526:     data class TimeGap(val timestamp: Long) : DisplayItem()
527: }
528: 
529: /**
530:  * Build a reversed list of display items: messages interleaved with date headers
531:  * and time-gap separators. The list is reversed so reverseLayout=true shows
532:  * newest messages at the bottom.
533:  */
534: private fun buildDisplayItems(messages: List<SmsMessage>): List<DisplayItem> {
535:     if (messages.isEmpty()) return emptyList()
536: 
537:     val items = mutableListOf<DisplayItem>()
538:     var lastDate = ""
539:     var lastTimestamp = 0L
540: 
541:     // Walk chronologically (oldest first)
542:     for (msg in messages) {
543:         // Date header
544:         val dateLabel = formatDateHeader(msg.timestamp)
545:         if (dateLabel != lastDate) {
546:             items.add(DisplayItem.DateHeader(dateLabel))
547:             lastDate = dateLabel
548:             lastTimestamp = msg.timestamp
549:         }
550: 
551:         // Time gap within same day
552:         if (lastTimestamp != 0L && msg.timestamp - lastTimestamp > TIME_GAP_MS &&
553:             dateLabel == lastDate && items.lastOrNull() !is DisplayItem.DateHeader
554:         ) {
555:             items.add(DisplayItem.TimeGap(msg.timestamp))
556:         }
557: 
558:         items.add(DisplayItem.MessageItem(msg))
559:         lastTimestamp = msg.timestamp
560:     }
561: 
562:     // Reverse so newest is at index 0 for reverseLayout
563:     return items.reversed()
564: }

## SMSentry Codebase Audit — Complete Findings

Here is the exhaustive bug/improvement scan across all 8 categories. Every finding includes file path, line number, and severity.

---

### 1. HARDCODED STRINGS IN UI FILES (should use `stringResource()`)

**Total: 38 instances across 5 files.** These all use `Text("...")` with inline English strings instead of `stringResource(R.string.xxx)`. This blocks i18n/l10n.

**ChatScreen.kt** (`D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\ui\chat\ChatScreen.kt`):
| Line | String | Severity |
|------|--------|----------|
| 170 | `Text("Delete message?")` | P2 |
| 171 | `Text("This message will be permanently deleted.")` | P2 |
| 181 | `Text("Delete")` | P2 |
| 185 | `Text("Cancel")` | P2 |
| 195 | `Text("Delete conversation?")` | P2 |
| 196 | `Text("All messages with $contactName will be permanently deleted.")` | P2 |
| 207 | `Text("Delete")` | P2 |
| 211 | `Text("Cancel")` | P2 |
| 230 | `Text("Copy")` | P2 |
| 245 | `Text("Forward")` | P2 |
| 265 | `Text("Deep Check")` | P2 |
| 284 | `Text("Delete", ...)` | P2 |
| 384 | `Text("Deep Check")` | P2 |
| 405 | `Text("Delete conversation", ...)` | P2 |
| 465 | `Text("No messages yet")` | P2 |
| 471 | `Text("Start the conversation!")` | P2 |
| 659 | `Text("Message", ...)` (placeholder) | P3 |
| 700 | `ClipData.newPlainText("SMS Message", text)` | P3 |

**ComposeSmsScreen.kt** (`D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\ui\compose\ComposeSmsScreen.kt`):
| Line | String | Severity |
|------|--------|----------|
| 117 | `Text("New Message")` | P2 |
| 149 | `Text("To")` | P2 |
| 150 | `Text("Phone number")` | P2 |
| 180 | `Text("Message")` | P2 |
| 181 | `Text("Type your message...")` | P2 |
| 276 | `Text("Sending...")` | P2 |
| 285 | `Text("Send Message")` | P2 |

**ConversationListScreen.kt** (`D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\ui\conversations\ConversationListScreen.kt`):
| Line | String | Severity |
|------|--------|----------|
| 161 | `Text("Refresh")` | P2 |
| 169 | `Text("Mark all as read")` | P2 |
| 418 | `Text("Delete conversation?")` | P2 |
| 419 | `Text("This will permanently delete all messages with ${conv.displayName}.")` | P2 |
| 429 | `Text("Delete")` | P2 |
| 433 | `Text("Cancel")` | P2 |

**DetailScreen.kt** (`D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\ui\detail\DetailScreen.kt`):
| Line | String | Severity |
|------|--------|----------|
| 320 | `Text("Downloading...")` | P2 |
| 339 | `Text("Initializing AI Engine...")` | P2 |
| 481 | `Text("Mark as Safe")` | P2 |
| 500 | `Text("Report as Scam")` | P2 |

**BlockedNumbersScreen.kt** & **SettingsScreen.kt**: ~10 more instances (lines 69, 71, 142, 147, 177, 179, 197, 202, 236, 265, 275, 277, 284, 289) — all P2.

---

### 2. UNUSED IMPORTS

| File | Line | Import | Severity |
|------|------|--------|----------|
| `NavGraph.kt` | 3 | `import android.util.Log` — never used (no `Log.` call) | P3 |
| `ConversationListViewModel.kt` | 4 | `import android.content.ContentResolver` — never referenced directly (uses `context.contentResolver`) | P3 |
| `SmsRepository.kt` | 7 | `import android.app.Activity` — never used anywhere in the file | P3 |
| `ComposeSmsScreen.kt` | 3 | `import android.app.Activity` — never used (only `ActivityResultContracts` is used) | P3 |

---

### 3. TODO/FIXME/HACK COMMENTS

**None found.** The entire `app/src/main/java/` directory has zero TODO, FIXME, or HACK comments. ✅

---

### 4. ERROR HANDLING GAPS — Silently Swallowed Exceptions

| File | Line | Catch Pattern | What's Lost | Severity |
|------|------|---------------|-------------|----------|
| **BlockedNumbersScreen.kt** | 191 | `catch (_: Exception)` — unblock fails silently | User gets no feedback that unblock failed. UI shows number removed but it's still blocked in the system. **Data inconsistency.** | **P1** |
| **ComposeSmsScreen.kt** | 86 | `catch (_: Exception)` — contact picker resolution fails silently | User picks a contact but nothing happens. No error toast. | P2 |
| **ChatScreen.kt** | 320 | `catch (_: Exception) { null }` — avatar bitmap loading | Acceptable — falls back to initial letter. | P3 |
| **DeepCheckDatabase.kt** | 183 | `catch (_: Exception)` — encryption migration | Comment says "already encrypted" — acceptable for migration. | P3 |
| **LiteRtLmEngine.kt** | 165 | `try { eng.close() } catch (_: Exception) {}` — cleanup on failure | Acceptable — best-effort cleanup. | P3 |
| **ContactResolver.kt** | 72 | `catch (e: Exception) { null }` — contact lookup fails silently | Returns null, caller falls back to raw number. Acceptable but could log for debugging. | P3 |

---

### 5. NULL SAFETY ISSUES — Force Unwraps (`!!`)

| File | Line | Code | Risk | Severity |
|------|------|------|------|----------|
| **ChatScreen.kt** | 222 | `val msg = selectedMessage!!` | Inside `if (selectedMessage != null)` guard — low risk due to Compose recomposition but technically a TOCTOU race since `selectedMessage` is mutable state. | P2 |
| **ChatViewModel.kt** | 177 | `smsObserver!!` in `registerContentObserver` call | Always set on the line above (164), but if `registerSmsObserver()` were called twice, the old observer would leak. | P2 |
| **ConversationListViewModel.kt** | 346 | `smsObserver!!` — same pattern as ChatViewModel | Same risk — safe in practice but fragile. | P2 |
| **BlockedNumbersScreen.kt** | 119 | `text = errorMessage!!` | Inside `errorMessage != null` branch — safe but should use `let` or smart-cast. | P3 |

**Unsafe Cast Found:**
| File | Line | Code | Severity |
|------|------|------|----------|
| **ChatScreen.kt** | 699 | `context.getSystemService(Context.CLIPBOARD_SERVICE) as ClipboardManager` | Technically safe on Android (always non-null), but `as` cast will crash if null. Should use `as?` or `getSystemService<ClipboardManager>()`. | P3 |

---

### 6. NAVIGATION ROUTES — Missing/Incomplete Screens

All 7 routes in `NavGraph.kt` lead to **fully implemented screens**:
- `conversations` → `ConversationListScreen` ✅
- `chat/{threadId}/{address}` → `ChatScreen` ✅
- `detail/{smsId}` → `DetailScreen` ✅
- `compose` → `ComposeSmsScreen` ✅
- `settings` → `SettingsScreen` ✅
- `blocked_numbers` → `BlockedNumbersScreen` ✅
- `model_download` → `ModelDownloadScreen` ✅

**However, there are two dead-end `onClick` handlers in SettingsScreen.kt:**
| Line | Code | Issue | Severity |
|------|------|-------|----------|
| 213 | `onClick = { /* Could navigate to model download screen */ }` | AI Model settings item is a no-op. Should navigate to `Screen.ModelDownload`. | **P1** |
| 225 | `onClick = { /* No-op or show about dialog */ }` | About/version item does nothing. | P3 |

---

### 7. BLOCKED NUMBERS SCREEN — Completeness Analysis

**File:** `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\ui\settings\BlockedNumbersScreen.kt` (283 lines)

**What works:**
- ✅ Loads blocked numbers from `BlockedNumberContract` (system API)
- ✅ Displays list with unblock button per item
- ✅ Unblock confirmation dialog with actual `contentResolver.delete()` call
- ✅ Empty state UI ("No blocked numbers")
- ✅ Error handling for non-default SMS app

**What's missing:**
| Issue | Detail | Severity |
|-------|--------|----------|
| **No "Add blocked number" feature** | Users can only view/unblock. There's no way to block a new number from this screen. Must navigate elsewhere. | **P1** |
| Silent unblock failure (line 191) | `catch (_: Exception)` swallows error — user sees number disappear from list but it remains blocked in the system | **P1** |
| No "block from chat" option | The ChatScreen long-press menu has Copy, Forward, Deep Check, Delete — but no "Block sender" | P2 |
| List doesn't refresh after unblock error | If unblock fails, the UI has already removed it from `blockedNumbers` list (line 190) | **P1** |

---

### 8. SETTINGS SCREEN — Completeness Analysis

**File:** `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\ui\settings\SettingsScreen.kt` (362 lines)

**Functional settings:**
- ✅ Theme picker (Light/Dark/System) — fully working with `ThemePreferenceRepository`
- ✅ Default SMS app toggle — launches `RoleManager` intent on API 29+
- ✅ Blocked numbers — navigates to `BlockedNumbersScreen`
- ✅ Import existing SMS — triggers `personalLearningRepo.importExistingSms()` with progress
- ✅ Learning data stats display
- ✅ Clear learning data — with confirmation dialog
- ✅ AI Model state display

**Issues found:**
| Line | Issue | Severity |
|------|-------|----------|
| 127 | Default SMS app: Only handles API Q+ (`Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Q`). On API 24-28, the click does nothing — no fallback to `Telephony.Sms.Intents.ACTION_CHANGE_DEFAULT`. | P2 |
| 213 | AI Model item `onClick` is `{ /* Could navigate to model download screen */ }` — dead code, no navigation | **P1** |
| 225 | About item `onClick` is `{ /* No-op or show about dialog */ }` — no action | P3 |
| 176 | Learning data item `onClick = {}` — empty lambda, not clickable but has the clickable appearance | P3 |

**SettingsViewModel.kt issues:**
| Line | Issue | Severity |
|------|-------|----------|
| 90 | `checkDefaultSmsApp()` returns `false` on all pre-Q devices — even if the app IS the default SMS app. Should check `Telephony.Sms.getDefaultSmsPackage()` as fallback. | P2 |

---

### SUMMARY BY SEVERITY

| Severity | Count | Examples |
|----------|-------|---------|
| **P0** | 0 | — |
| **P1** | 4 | Silent unblock failure + UI desync, no "Add blocked number", AI Model settings dead click, BlockedNumbers list state corruption on error |
| **P2** | ~45 | 38 hardcoded strings, 4 `!!` force unwraps, pre-Q default SMS check, no "Block sender" in chat |
| **P3** | ~12 | Unused imports, safe `catch (_:)` blocks, dead About click |

The most impactful fixes would be:
1. **P1:** Fix BlockedNumbersScreen unblock error handling + add error feedback
2. **P1:** Wire up the AI Model settings item to navigate to `Screen.ModelDownload`
3. **P1:** Add "Block number" capability to BlockedNumbersScreen
4. **P2:** Extract all 38+ hardcoded strings to `strings.xml` for i18n
